userGoal: Validate incoming webhook payloads before processing and return structured 400 errors for malformed or incomplete payloads.

inScope: Return structured validation errors as HTTP 400.
Add tests for valid and invalid payloads.
outOfScope: Adding retry behavior for failed webhooks.
assumptions: Existing payload formats must remain backward compatible.
Validation rules are static for this iteration.

components.name: WebhookPayloadValidator
components.responsibility: Validates payload shape and required fields.
extensionPoints: Add new validation rules via ValidationRule.

components.name: ValidationErrorMapper
components.responsibility: Converts validation failures into API responses.

extensionPoints: ValidationRule interface for adding future field rules without touching the handler.
rejectedAlternatives: Inline validation inside WebhookHandler, rejected because it mixes coordination with validation.

reviewFindings: No unrelated retry, auth, or schema behavior added.

knownRisks: Existing clients sending legacy payload shapes must still pass validation.

docChanges: Added WebhookPayloadValidator as the single validation entry point.
WebhookHandler now delegates validation instead of performing inline checks.
Request flow diagram now includes validation before processing.
